candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing item and non-current, not a valid ACT measure.

variables.notes: Selected the direct total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet match for cash and cash equivalents.
Generic cash-flow label, but balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents is preferred for CHE.
Not cash and cash equivalents total.

candidates.row_label: As Reported Cash fr Operating Activities
candidates.why: Operating cash flow, not balance-sheet cash.

candidates.row_label: As Reported Cash fr Investing Activities
candidates.why: Investing cash flow, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: As Reported Cash fr Financing Activities
candidates.why: Financing cash flow, not cash balance.
Cash interest paid, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Selected the direct balance-sheet cash line.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Direct match for short-term debt/current maturities due within one year; financing-related and excludes leases by label.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose the clean current debt maturity line; did not add other debt rows to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Most likely current taxes payable/current tax liabilities given placement among current liabilities.
Appears in the current assets section near receivables, so more likely tax receivable than taxes payable.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate existed. Selected 'Taxes' because it appears within current liabilities and best matches taxes payable. 'Corporation Tax' appears under current assets, suggesting a receivable rather than payable.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet line corresponding to PPE/tangible fixed assets; preferable to blank or depreciation component lines.
Could relate to investment property/PPE net book value, but appears blank and less clean than the reported tangible assets total.
Gross placeholder appears blank; less suitable than reported net tangible assets.
Depreciation/impairment component, not total PPE.

variables.notes: Selected the best available reported PPE-like line from the balance sheet. Although net rather than gross, it is the cleanest direct asset total among the available labels.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the direct total assets line.

candidates.row_label: As Reported Cash fr Operating Activities
candidates.why: Direct match for net cash flow from operating activities; preferred over the pre-working-capital subtotal.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: As Reported Cash fr Operating Activities

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the shortlist because it is the correct final net operating cash flow line, whereas the shortlisted row is only a subtotal before working-capital changes.
